text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 209 

RDLGY_OTHR_IMGNG_IND_SW 

LABEL: Radiology Other Imaging Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: The switch indicating whether the beneficiary received other radiology imaging services (e.g., 
ultrasound, mammography) during the stay. 

SHORT NAME: IMGNG_SW 

LONG NAME: RDLGY_OTHR_IMGNG_IND_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = No other imaging services (revenue code not 040x)
